name: io.github.andrelaptenok/redmine-mcp-stdio
description: Local MCP (stdio) server for Redmine: issues, projects and time tracking from any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: REDMINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Redmine instance (e.g. https://redmine.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: REDMINE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Redmine API access key (My account > API access key)
